13 reviews for Vyntech Neckband

  1. Rated 4 out of 5

    Sona (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Used it for a few weeks The box has neckband, few buds and paperwork. PROS: - Noise cancellation is good - Call quality is good. - Audio is good, app provides equalizer for fine tuning according to personal taste. - Battery seems to be fine. - Spatial audio is good. I paired with dolby atmos in phone and it's great. CONS: - Able to connect both devices simultaneously but there seems to be an issue with switching between devices. - Both devices are always connected at same time. - If both are not playing, the one which starts playing audio first is played. If 2nd device plays simultaneously and we try to switch it won't pause and switch. - Even when neither device plays audio we can't seem to switch between devices to do some volume control or something. - The charging port doesn't come with a cover

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Sona,

    We apologize for the inconvenience regarding the device switching experience. Please mail us at help.vyntech@gmail.com and we will assign a software support expert to help you calibrate your neckband settings for seamless dual-pairing control.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  2. Rated 4 out of 5

    Tushar (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Sound Quality: 5/5 Loudness 5/5 Calling Experience: 5/5 Design and build quality: 3/5 I’ve used many earphones over the years, but this piece of tech truly stands out. At this price point, everything feels just right. I've been using these for over a year now, and they're still going strong. They’ve survived multiple rainy rides — they’re practically my daily companion, always hanging around my neck. Even when I let friends try them out, the first thing they mention is the impressive sound quality. They just have to work on their build quality like I have purchased 2 of them one for me one for my mother. in some cases their build is bad it like get damaged very easily in a short period of time I’ve tried neckbands from Realme, Oppo, and more, but this one beats them all in pricing, sound clarity, and noise cancellation. Still eagerly waiting for the next version! I have attached 1 photo of when I purchased them and 1 current photo

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Tushar,

    We appreciate your detailed and valuable feedback over the past year! We have acknowledged your query regarding the build quality and material durability. We will surely pass this suggestion to our development team and try working on it for our upcoming releases.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  3. Rated 5 out of 5

    Sunil Sharma (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Sound quality of these earbuds are good. These are not for gaming as this have higher 120ms of latency. Color is nice these are comfortable on the neck and also the NC is absolutely killing but the feature dual device connection lack reliability as when I'm watching a show on laptop and call appears it won't stop the video on laptop and just allow me take the call. The video still runs in background with no voice and when the call disconnects it will not give back the sound of laptop hand to hand it takes sometime to do that. Switch devices feature is good in this. App connectivity is also seamless. Although can go for it..

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Sunil,

    Thank you for the detailed feedback! We apologize for the inconvenience with the dual-device handover delay on your laptop. Please mail us at help.vyntech@gmail.com and our product expert will assist you with calibration tweaks to improve the switching speed.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  4. Rated 3 out of 5

    Aryan Tiwary (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Everything fine -bass,mic, fitting, build are great. 🛑But the problem is, the left earbud produces some creaking sound when someone speaks in the audio and it's quite noticable and irritating. I think some cost cutting has been done to provide product in this budget. Bass 5/5 (ultra bass is useless) Build quality 4/5 Latency 3/5 (very laggy,even app doesn't help much) Mic quality/ call quality 4.5/5 Battery life 3.5/5 (doesn't last long) I think, defective product was delivered to me. So, I will update this review for new ones. Need to work on that creaking/ distortion in the left earbud. Rest's 👍

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Aryan,

    We really apologize for the inconvenience caused by the creaking sound in the left piece. You need not worry, as mentioned in our replacement policy; you can easily initiate a replacement, and your brand new product will be delivered to you within the same period as the first delivery.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  5. Rated 4 out of 5

    Rinoy David (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Using for 5 months vfm neckband. No complaints till now. Anc is decent and call quality is excellent. Bass is high even if we tweak it's still high 😂 for music it's very good. For gaming not good 120ms 😔 even using low latency mode not recommended for gaming. Spatial Audio is just gimmick don't fall for it. Bose Quiet Comfort Ultra 2 was my primary but now it's this neckband. Call 4/5 Music 4/5 ANC 3.5/5 Gaming 2.5/5 Looks 5/5 Functions 4.5/5 Overall 4 stars 🙌 recommended

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Rinoy,

    We are thrilled to hear it became your primary driver! We have acknowledged your feedback regarding the latency mode during gaming, and we will try working on optimizing the low-latency software profile in our future firmware updates.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  6. Rated 5 out of 5

    Karthik M. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Absolutely fantastic audio quality for the price. The active noise cancellation handles gym environments effortlessly, and the battery life has been phenomenal so far. Very happy with this purchase!

  7. Rated 5 out of 5

    Neha Gupta (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    The bass is deep and rich, perfect for my daily commutes. I love the premium feel of the materials used, it definitely feels like a much more expensive product.

  8. Rated 5 out of 5

    Arjun P. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Delivery was super fast and the setup took just seconds. The microphone clarity during work meetings has been praised by my colleagues. Highly recommended!

  9. Rated 3 out of 5

    Rakesh Tiwari (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Good battery backup but the neckband wire is a bit stiff. It feels a little uncomfortable if worn all day under a collar. Sound is okayish.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Rakesh,

    We have acknowledged your query regarding the neckband wire flexibility. We will surely pass this suggestion to our development team to try working on it for future product iterations.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  10. Rated 4 out of 5

    Simran Kaur (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Impressive battery life and fast charging. The ANC is good enough for office use. Deducted one star because the volume could be slightly louder.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Simran,

    We appreciate your valuable feedback! We will keep your volume suggestion in mind for our future firmware updates. Please mail us at help.vyntech@gmail.com if you need help customizing the EQ settings.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  11. Rated 5 out of 5

    Manoj V. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Absolutely amazing neckband at this price point. The bass is thumping and call quality is crystal clear even in traffic.

  12. Rated 5 out of 5

    Deepak Joshi (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Perfect for my daily workouts. They don't fall out while running and the sweat resistance is a lifesaver. Highly recommend it!

  13. Rated 5 out of 5

    Anjali R. (verified purchase) – April 26, 2026

    Very quick pairing with my phone and laptop. The magnetic pause/play feature works flawlessly. Great job Vyntech!
